shorts.title: Local scouts hit the road to National Scout Jamboree
shorts.title_distilled: Local scouts hit the road to National Scout Jamboree.
shorts.description: MOOSIC, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — An eight-hour drive is just the start of a 10-day adventure for 35 local scouts. They left Moosic on Tuesday for the National Scout Jamboree, an event held once every four years. The 10-day event will bring together thousands of scouts from across the country to West Virginia.
